Timeline Event: Meta Opens WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots in EU
description: Regulatory pressure forces Meta to allow third-party AI assistants inside WhatsApp in Europe.

title: [Analysis] Model convergence question underestimates benchmark parity

title: [Bias] Timeline has zero entries for AI ethics, bias, or labor impact
description: **Gap:** The timeline covers model releases, funding rounds, and technical milestones but has almost nothing about AI's societal impact beyond two policy entries (Biden EO and UK Safety Summit).

title: [Missing Event] InstructGPT / RLHF (2022) — The alignment breakthrough that enabled ChatGPT

title: [Missing Event] AlphaFold 2 (2020) — AI solves protein folding
description: **Gap:** The timeline has zero entries for AI in scientific discovery. AlphaFold 2 is arguably the single most impactful real-world AI application to date.

title: [Missing Event] BERT (2018) — The bidirectional transformer breakthrough
description: **Gap:** Timeline lists GPT-1 (June 2018) but completely omits BERT (October 2018).

title: [Date Error] First AI Winter started ~1973, not 1969

Timeline Addition: Pentagon Designates Anthropic a 'Supply Chain Risk'
ELIZA — First Chatbot
New $100M Political Fund Aims to Influence Pro-AI Deregulation in US Midterms
description: Innovation Council Action, a new political group backed by former Trump aides and David Sacks, announced plans to spend over $100 million in the 2026 US midterms to support pro-deregulation candidates and advance the 'AI race against China.'

title: Industry Reports Highlight Enterprise AI ROI Challenges Amid Soaring Budgets
description: Industry reports indicate a growing gap between soaring AI budgets and actual ROI, with only 25% of enterprises successfully moving more than 40% of their AI pilots into full production due to challenges in proving tangible returns.

title: NVIDIA and Marvell Announce $2 Billion Strategic Partnership for AI Infrastructure
description: NVIDIA announced a $2 billion investment in Marvell Technology, forming a strategic partnership to integrate Marvell into NVIDIA's AI factory and AI-RAN ecosystem. This collaboration leverages NVIDIA NVLink Fusion to enable semi-custom AI infrastructure and advance silicon photonics for 5G/6G networks.

title: Google DeepMind unveils 'Gemini Ultra 2.0' with enhanced multimodal reasoning
description: Google DeepMind announced the release of Gemini Ultra 2.0, a significant upgrade to its flagship multimodal AI model. The new version boasts enhanced reasoning capabilities across text, image, and video, demonstrating superior performance in complex scientific problem-solving and creative content generation benchmarks. Analysts predict its widespread adoption could accelerate advancements in various AI-driven applications.

title: Anthropic's Claude Overtakes ChatGPT in App Store Amidst 'QuitGPT' Movement
description: Anthropic's AI model, Claude, surged to the #1 spot on the U.S. App Store, surpassing ChatGPT for the first time. This shift is attributed to a 'QuitGPT' movement, where users are reportedly migrating to Claude due to Anthropic's public refusal to allow its models for mass surveillance or autonomous weapons, contrasting with OpenAI's controversial partnership with the Pentagon.

title: Anthropic Source Code Leak Raises Critical Concerns Over AI Intellectual Property Security
description: Over 512,000 lines of source code for Anthropic's Claude Code CLI were leaked, sparking industry-wide discussions on AI intellectual property security. The incident highlights the growing challenges and vulnerabilities in protecting proprietary AI technologies.

title: Accenture Acquires Keepler Data Tech to Enhance Agentic AI Capabilities
description: Accenture acquired Keepler Data Tech, a Spanish cloud-native AI firm. This acquisition is intended to strengthen Accenture's offerings in 'agentic AI' and data foundation services for its European enterprise clients, signaling a growing focus on integrating autonomous AI into business operations.

title: LLMs Demonstrate High Accuracy in Identifying Drug Safety Signals in Clinical Notes
description: A multi-center study published in eBioMedicine showed that large language models (LLMs), specifically GPT-4o, can effectively identify drug safety signals and adverse events from clinical notes with high accuracy using zero-shot learning.

title: Z.ai Open-Sources GLM-5.1 for Autonomous Engineering
description: Z.ai has released its GLM-5.1 model under an MIT License. This model is specifically optimized for 'long-horizon autonomous engineering,' designed to handle extended autonomous tasks rather than short-burst reasoning. Its open-source nature aims to foster broader innovation and development in the field of autonomous AI systems.

title: NVIDIA Launches "Ising" Quantum AI Models
description: NVIDIA announced the world’s first family of open-source quantum AI models, named NVIDIA Ising. These models are designed to accelerate the development of useful quantum computers by improving processor calibration and error-correction decoding up to 2.5 times faster than traditional methods.

title: AI-Driven Chip Shortage Slows Global Internet Access for Billions
description: The GSMA (telecoms industry association) warned that the massive demand for AI-specific memory chips is diverting resources away from standard networking hardware, hindering efforts to connect the 2.2 billion people worldwide who still lack internet access.

title: Canadian NDP Calls for Federal Ban on AI 'Surveillance Pricing'
description: Canada's New Democratic Party (NDP) has called for a federal ban on 'surveillance pricing,' where AI algorithms set different prices for the same item based on an individual's personal data and search history.

title: Google.org Expands Digital Futures Fund to $35 Million
description: Google.org committed an additional $15 million, bringing its Digital Futures Fund to a total of $35 million. The fund supports independent global think tanks and academic institutions researching AI’s long-term impacts on the global economy, workforce opportunities, and cybersecurity.

title: Intel Launches "NeuroBridge" - A New Chip Architecture for Energy-Efficient Large Model Training
description: Intel announced "NeuroBridge," a revolutionary chip architecture designed specifically for highly energy-efficient training and inference of next-generation large AI models. The new design promises a 5x improvement in compute-per-watt efficiency compared to current leading AI accelerators.

title: Elon Musk Reportedly Pursues Tesla/SpaceX 'Terafab' Project for Humanoid Robot AI
description: Reports indicate that Elon Musk is initiating a joint venture between Tesla and SpaceX to establish a 'Terafab,' a facility designed to supply 1 terawatt of annual computing capacity. This ambitious project aims to produce custom semiconductors specifically tailored for the development and deployment of humanoid robots.

title: Apply Digital Launches TORQ AI "Agentic Accelerator" on Google Cloud
description: Apply Digital launched TORQ AI, an "agentic accelerator" on Google Cloud, designed to provide CPG, retail, and media enterprises with a production-grade path to functional AI within 30 days. This platform aims to significantly reduce the time and complexity of deploying AI solutions in businesses.

title: Mira Murati's Thinking Machine Labs Secures $2 Billion in Funding
description: Mira Murati's new AI venture, Thinking Machine Labs, has raised $2 billion, signaling significant investment in cutting-edge AI research and development.

title: Fei-Fei Li's Spatial Intelligence Startup World Labs Valued Over $1 Billion
description: Fei-Fei Li's spatial intelligence startup, World Labs, achieved a valuation of over $1 billion, indicating strong investor confidence in its innovative AI applications.

title: SK hynix Begins Mass Production of Next-Gen Memory for NVIDIA's Vera Rubin Platform
description: SK hynix announced the mass production of 192GB SOCAMM2 memory modules, specifically engineered to eliminate memory bottlenecks in the training of large language models (LLMs) on NVIDIA’s forthcoming Vera Rubin platform.

title: Critical 'By Design' Flaw Discovered in Anthropic’s Model Context Protocol (MCP)
description: Cybersecurity researchers identified a critical 'by design' vulnerability in Anthropic’s Model Context Protocol (MCP), potentially enabling remote code execution (RCE) across thousands of AI-integrated software packages.

title: Hannover Messe 2026 Centers on Industrial AI, Humanoid Robotics, and Computing Capacity
description: The world's largest industrial trade fair, Hannover Messe, opened with industrial AI and humanoid robots as central themes. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz stressed AI's role in boosting productivity and competitiveness, announcing plans to double Germany's computing capacity by 2030. NVIDIA also demonstrated "agentic design" and Industrial AI Cloud applications at the event.

sources.label: Xinhua News Agency - Hannover Messe Opening

title: Hannover Messe 2026 Highlights Industrial AI and Germany's Computing Ambition
description: The Hannover Messe industrial trade fair opened with a significant focus on 'Industrial AI' and humanoid robots. NVIDIA and its partners showcased AI-driven manufacturing solutions, including agentic design and real-time digital twins. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz underscored AI's pivotal role in achieving Germany's goal of doubling its computing capacity by 2030, signaling a national commitment to industrial AI infrastructure.

title: OpenAI Codex Gains Direct Operating System Control
description: A significant update to the OpenAI Codex app now enables the AI to directly control macOS and Windows operating systems, allowing it to perform complex tasks across multiple applications autonomously. This marks a major leap in AI autonomy and its integration into daily computing.

title: Google Begins Global Rollout of Chrome "AI Mode"
description: Google has initiated the global rollout of a native AI Mode within its Chrome browser, integrating Gemini capabilities directly for real-time article summarization and contextual Q&A. This move brings advanced AI features to millions of users, fundamentally altering web browsing and information consumption.

title: Anthropic's "Claude Mythos" Security Breach
description: Anthropic confirms investigation into unauthorized access of 'Claude Mythos', its unreleased and most powerful AI model, capable of autonomously exploiting zero-day vulnerabilities. The model was previously withheld due to its potential for global systemic risk.

title: Google Cloud Next '26 Unveils 'Agentic Era' and New AI Infrastructure
description: Google Cloud announced a massive infrastructure expansion focused on 'Agentic AI', introducing TPU 8t and TPU 8i, A5X instances (NVIDIA Vera Rubin architecture), a $1 billion deal with Merck for drug discovery, and a $750 million fund for AI agent development partners.

title: Sony AI Unveils Robot Capable of Beating Elite Human Table Tennis Players
description: Sony AI published research in Nature detailing a robot capable of outplaying elite human table tennis players. This represents a significant milestone in Physical AI, demonstrating advanced real-time adaptation to complex, high-speed physical environments.

title: Pudu Robotics Raises $150 Million to Scale Commercial Robotics
description: Pudu Robotics, a leader in service robotics, successfully raised $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation. This funding is intended to scale its 'single brain, multiple embodiments' strategy for applications in commercial cleaning and industrial delivery, expanding the reach of physical AI.
